description: Blend v2 yield-claim flow recorded on Stellar testnet. Pool contract: CCEBVDYM32YNYCVNRXQKDFFPISJJCV557CDZEIRBEE4NCV4KHPQ44HGF (TestnetV2 pool from blend-utils testnet.contracts.json).
